Describe a time you had to collaborate with other developers (Android, backend, design) on a complex feature. What was your role, and what was the outcome?
Imagine a user is reporting a crash that you cannot reproduce on your development device. How would you approach debugging and resolving this issue?
What are some best practices for designing responsive and accessible user interfaces in Android? How do you support different screen sizes and densities?
You're asked to integrate a new, unfamiliar third-party library into an existing project. What steps would you take to evaluate, integrate, and test it effectively?
How do you identify and resolve performance bottlenecks in an Android application, particularly related to UI rendering or battery consumption?
Tell me about a time you disagreed with a technical decision made by a team member or a lead. How did you handle it, and what was the resolution?
What types of testing do you typically perform for an Android application? Describe your experience with unit, integration, and UI testing frameworks.
Consider an application that needs to display a large list of items (e.g., 1000+). How would you optimize its performance and memory usage?
What are common security considerations when developing Android applications, and how do you mitigate potential vulnerabilities?
How do you stay up-to-date with the latest Android development trends, technologies, and best practices?
